info.title: TEA Platform API
info.description: API documentation for the Trustworthy & Ethical Assurance Platform. This API provides access to assurance cases, elements, teams, comments, and case studies.

BearerAuth.description: Machine API token (`Authorization: Bearer <token>`), issued via the integration registry

url.description: GitHub URL or shorthand path to the JSON file

branch.description: Branch name (optional, uses default branch if not specified)

get.summary: Get an assurance case by ID
get.description: Retrieves the full case structure including goals, strategies,

schema.$ref: #/components/schemas/200 - Full case data with nested elements

put.description: Updates the name, description, or colour profile of a case.

delete.description: Moves a case to trash (soft-delete). Cases remain in trash for 30 days

get.summary: Export an assurance case as JSON
get.description: Exports the specified case in nested JSON format (v1.0).

post.summary: Import an assurance case from JSON
post.description: Imports a case from JSON data. Accepts v1 (legacy Django),

schema.$ref: #/components/schemas/JSON case data in any supported format

schema.$ref: #/components/schemas/200 - { isValid, version, caseName, elementCount, evidenceLinkCount, warnings }

get.summary: List cases in the user's trash
